requirement.title: Parse Rich Transcript Into Action Log
requirement.description: parseActionsFromTranscript(richTranscript) parses [Tool: Name] args and [Assistant] text patterns into a structured action array.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given a transcript with "[Tool: Skill] arc-verifying", parser returns { type: 'tool', name: 'Skill', args: 'arc-verifying', index: N }. REQ-F001
Given a transcript with "[Assistant] some text", parser returns { type: 'text', content: 'some text', index: N }. REQ-F001
For multi-line tool output (e.g., [Tool: Write] followed by file content), parser takes only the first line as args and skips subsequent lines until the next [Tool:] or [Assistant] marker. REQ-F001
Index is 0-based, monotonically increasing across all entries. REQ-F001
Empty transcript returns empty array. REQ-F001

requirement.title: Action Log Stored In Trial Result
requirement.description: Trial results include an actions field parsed from the transcript.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: TrialResult object includes actions: Action[] field after running a trial. REQ-F005
Existing trial results without actions field remain valid (no breakage). REQ-N002
Actions field is persisted in JSONL results file. REQ-F005
